zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Middleton於1269年出生在英國越可爾米德萊頓時，他的父親Peter de Middleton26歲，母親Agnes Lavenham13歲。他於1297年與Agnes le Boteler在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1318年在他的家鄉享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Middleton于1269年出生在英国越可爾米德萊頓时，他的父亲Peter de Middleton26岁，母亲Agnes Lavenham13岁。他于1297年与Agnes le Boteler在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1318年在他的家乡享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Middleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so called. In over thirty instances from many different areas, the name is from Old English midel ‘middle’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. However, Middleton on the Hill near Leominster in Herefordshire appears in Domesday Book as Miceltune, the first element clearly being Old English micel ‘large’, ‘great’ (see Middlebrook ). Middleton Baggot and Middleton Priors in Shropshire have early spellings that suggest gem̄thhyll (from gem̄th ‘confluence’ + hyll ‘hill’) + tūn as the origin. This surname is also found in Scotland and Ireland.

History: A Scottish family of this name derives it from lands at Middleto(u)n near Kincardine. The Scottish physician Peter Middleton practiced in New York City after 1752 and was one of the founders of the medical school at King's College (now Columbia University) in 1767. One of the earliest of the Charleston, SC, Middleton family of prominent legislators was Arthur Middleton, born in Charleston in 1681. The name has also been established in Ireland since at least the 13th century; its presence was reinforced by settlers in the 17th century.

variants.name: Midthun
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of about ten farmsteads in western Norway named Midtun, from Old Norse mith ‘middle’ + tún ‘enclosure, farmstead’. Compare Middleton .

variants.name: Melton
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of various places, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, and Yorkshire, all of which have the same origin as Middleton , with Old English middel replaced by its Old Norse equivalent methal after the Scandinavian settlement of northern and eastern England.

variants.name: Middlebrook
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost Micklebrook in Blackburn (Lancashire), recorded as Mikelbroc in the 13th century. The placename appears to derive from Old English micel ‘big’ + brōc ‘brook, stream’. The surname has undergone a dissimilatory or folk-etymological change from Mickle- to Middle-.

variants.name: Milton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from one or other of the many places called Milton, or sometimes Middleton (see Middleton ) and occasionally Melton (see Melton ), most of which derive from Old English middel ‘middle’ or myln ‘mill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Middleton was born in 1269, in Middleton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Peter de Middleton, was 26 and his mother, Agnes Lavenham, was 13. He married Agnes le Boteler in 1297, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1318, in his hometown, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Middleton est né en 1269, à Middleton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Peter de Middleton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes Lavenham, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Agnes le Boteler en 1297, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1318, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Middleton 1269 in Middleton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Peter de Middleton 26 und seine Mutter Agnes Lavenham 13. Er hat 1297 in Yorkshire, England Agnes le Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1318 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Middleton è nato il nel 1269 nel Middleton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Peter de Middleton, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Lavenham, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Agnes le Boteler nel 1297, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1318, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Middletonが1269年にイギリスヨークシュアイアミッドレトンで生まれた時，父Peter de Middletonは26歳，母Agnes Lavenhamは13歳であった。1297年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでAgnes le Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1318年に故郷で49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Middleton(이)가 1269년 영국 요르크실르 미들레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter de Middleton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Lavenham(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1297년 영국 요르크실르에서 Agnes le Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1318년 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Middleton nasceu em 1269, em Middleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peter de Middleton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Lavenham, tinha 13 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Middleton родился в 1269 г. в местности миддлетон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Peter de Middleton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Lavenham, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes le Boteler в 1297 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1318 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Middleton nació en 1269, en Middleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Peter de Middleton, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes Lavenham, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Agnes le Boteler en 1297, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1318, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años.
